subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from the presence of Bahá unto him who dwelleth within his soul in the days of his Lord, the Mighty, the All-Powerful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی البهاء الی الذی سکن فی نفسه فی ایام ربه العزیز المقتدر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
